narrative_beat: Wide triadic panoramic: left Daniel looking up (crimson/gold), center Orwell typewriting (gray-ochre), right contemporary world P&B with drones and screens, embers connecting all

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a wide panoramic triadic composition with three planes: left Daniel the prophet looking upward in crimson and gold robes, center Orwell typewriting in gray and ochre suit, right a contemporary surveillance scene with drones and screens
subject.focal_point: the three planes linked by a continuous horizontal stream of floating embers across the whole frame
subject.secondary: Left and center in rich warm tones. Right plane desaturated.

composition.foreground: left and center in rich crimson, ochre and gold

lighting.key_light: horizontal directional warm light crossing frame
lighting.rim_light: gold rim on all three figures

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: Daniel saw, Orwell named, world builds
symbolism.secondary: embers as prophetic thread across time

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
